title: gossypium arboreum subsp. perenne
intro: Gossypium arboreum subsp. perenne, also known as the perennial tree cotton or Indian cotton, is a subspecies of the Gossypium arboreum plant, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gossypium arboreum subsp. perenne include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
